CH22008 Tutorial Notes Benjamin J. Morgan 2026-03-20 About these notes These notes accompany the tutorial questions for Y2 Physical Chemistry at the University of Bath. They are intended to help you understand the chemistry behind the calculations; what is physically happening, and why. Throughout these notes, the emphasis is on thinking through each problem before reaching for an equation. These notes are not a replacement for the tutorial itself, nor for your lecture notes. They are a companion resource, designed to be read alongside the tutorial questions.
